stemHtml: Airborne Weather Radar has a frequency of (1) _____ Ghz with a wavelength of approximately (2) _____ cm. It detects (3) _____ and is used to avoid areas of (4) _____. Select the answer that lists the correct options.

options.c: (1) 3 GHz (2) 9 cm (3) Wet hail (4) Turbulence in cloud
options.d: (1) 9 GHz (2) 3 cm (3) Wet hail (4) Turbulence in cloud
